publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-08-30 18:08:03 -0400.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York State College of Agriculture Finance and Business Office records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture. Finance and Business Office

did.abstract: General files of the Financial office

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: General files of the Financial office

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York State College of Agriculture Finance and Business Office records, #21-4-784. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.
